programme.title: Incredible Tales S8
programme.desc: It is said that spirits seeking revenge can return to haunt those that deserve punishment. For Dave, his foolish actions come back to haunt him in more ways than one - a punishment that he will never forget.

programme.title: Leverage: Redemption S3
programme.desc: A morally ambiguous CEO has found a way to exploit people's death using cryonics. The team runs a con on the CEO in an attempt to change his ways.

programme.title: Lingo UK S1
programme.desc: Lingo is the fast paced word-play game that keeps on innovating for new audiences, with its mix of skill, tension, humour and the chance to win big cash prizes. Teams are pitted against each other in a battle to fill in the blanks and find words.

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather S6
programme.desc: Nature is a tempestuous beast, capable of destruction on a level so devastating and claimed the lives of millions. In recent years, these extreme weather events have become more and more commonplace.

programme.title: Ski Dreams
programme.desc: Told through the eyes of Faiz Basha and Morgan Celley, two young, determined ski racers from Singapore with sky high goals – making it to the Winter Olympics 2026. This documentary follows their journey from the first time they strapped on skis to the brink of Olympic qualification. Faiz and Morgan invite viewers into their world, sharing the challenges, sacrifices, and triumphs that define their pursuit of an unlikely dream.

programme.title: Champions Of The Water
programme.desc: The series follows the fortunes of an individual team at each round of the UIM E1 World Championship presented by PIF, featuring the conflict and camaraderie as pilots and owners bid to become Champions of the Water.

programme.title: Mat Yoyo S2
programme.desc: Mat Yoyo S2.

programme.title: Club M.A.G.I.C Sr 3
programme.desc: CLUB M.A.G.I.C - the first, locally produced preschool series on OKTO – returns for a third season with fresh new ideas for a positively fun learning experience! An original concept developed for preschoolers.

programme.title: The Big Q S3
programme.desc: The Big Q S3.

programme.title: Count TV
programme.desc: COUNT TV makes math fun for kids! Hosted by Randall and Andy, the two find themselves in all kinds of quizzical, mathematical situations each week. And it's up to them to figure out the solutions!

programme.title: Tayo the Little Bus 4
programme.desc: The adventures of Tayo, a blue bus with the number 120. He is very playful and mischievous with his passengers and his friends.

programme.title: Slimed Science
programme.desc: Dr Slime has been invited to a birthday party and was tasked to bring balloons. Along the way, he had learnt that balloons can come in handy even in the least expected situations! What might they be?

programme.title: Slimed Science
programme.desc: Even eating watermelons need some science! Dr Slime has applied some clever science tricks to bring the watermelon home, cut it apart, and clean out the stains!

programme.title: Wild Kratts S7
programme.desc: In each episode, Chris and Martin Kratt travel to a different corner of the world to meet amazing new animals. Join the Wild Kratts for a laugh-out-loud comedy adventure, as Martin and Chris activate their Creature Power Suits to rescue their animal friends!

programme.title: Pfffirates
programme.desc: On Calypso Island, three crews are taught Pfffiracy by the legendary Captain Lamar. This tough training program ranges from sailing exercises and treasure hunting competitions to cannon firing and accosting enemy ships! But it would take more than that for Pat, Lily or Stede to give up. When a Pfffirate has friends to count on, nothing is impossible!

programme.title: Agents Of Sprawl
programme.desc: Zayd and Meiling put themselves through a long list of bizarre challenges in order to strengthen their minds and their Sprawl avatars. But as they continue to fail to get results, they start to pit themselves against increasingly terrifying ordeals... until they finally wind up in real danger!

programme.title: Jade Armor S2
programme.desc: Join Lan Jun, the unlikely Chinese teen hero who inherits a magical suit of armor, and her Beasticon talking animal friends, as they continue to defend their city of Ban Tang, against the Crimson Lord and Black Tiger!

programme.title: P. King Duckling
programme.desc: P. King Duckling is an animated comedy series that follows the adventures of a friendly but slightly hapless duck P. King and his two best friends, Wombat and Chumpkins, as they find hilarious and creative ways to overcome challenges.

programme.title: Metal Cardbot S1
programme.desc: (Dual Language English and Mandarin) A long time ago, there was a planet named Machina where a race of sentient machines, or Metal Cardbots, resided. One day, the planet suddenly explodes, forcing its inhabitants to live on Earth. To not attract attention, the Cardbots disguise themselves as everyday vehicles. In the present day, Jun, an elementary school kid who loves BMX, accidentally discovers the Metal Breath, a wrist gadget that allows him to capture and power up the Cardbots with differ...

programme.title: P. King Duckling Adventure Buds
programme.desc: This series features three good friends, P. King the silly enthusiastic duckling, Wombat the fluffy book-loving wombat, and Chumpkins the "genius" inventor pig, and their computer assistant Zeusy. For the Adventure Buds, life is all about making every day crazy fun - taking any idea or activity and making it an awesome adventure!

programme.title: Miniforce Animaltron S4
programme.desc: Across the galaxy, a monster tribe called "Egg King," which had been observed in "Animal Planet," scattered around Earth. Lion, the Prince of Animaltron, and his friends came to Earth to catch Egg King' monsters. Animaltron and Miniforce join forces to protect Earth!

programme.title: Space Nova S1
programme.desc: Space Nova is an exciting and captivating space adventure which follows the Nova family's search for alien life throughout the universe.

programme.title: The Adventures Of The Young Marco Polo - Journey To Madagascar
programme.desc: Marco Polo is about to return home to Venice when he discovers that his friend Shi La is not an orphan! To find her long-lost mother, Marco, Shi La, and Luigi set out on an adventurous journey across new countries!

programme.title: Game On
programme.desc: A pro soccer player trades his boots for silat guards, set to master the fluid movements and precise techniques of this traditional martial art. Can the young coach impart her wisdom and instill the discipline of silat?

programme.title: Films & Stars 2026/27
programme.desc: Films and Stars cover the hottest events from the big screen every week.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off S8
programme.desc: The junior version of this global phenomenon returns, hosted by BAFTA-winning comedian Harry Hill. Pastry chef and food writer Ravneet Gill and Bake Off alumnus Liam Charles return to judge the efforts of more budding bakers. It's a mouth-watering journey, as 16 of the country's best young bakers compete. A joyful way of getting children passionate about food.

programme.title: Croc Watch and Hippo Watch with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: With his trademark adventure-style approach, Steve takes us to South Africa's Ndumo Game Reserve to explore the dangerous world of hippos and crocs. Remarkable moments include the tagging of a formidable three-meter-long crocodile the unique dietary habits of hippos (and how they cause conflict with local farmers) and how vulnerable these creatures are to climate change.

programme.title: The Cube S11
programme.desc: Contestants must battle to win a top prize of 250,000 pounds and each of them must complete apparently simple tasks while under the spotlight in a large perspex cube. Each task is worth a prize and the contestants will have to work hard to stay in the game.

programme.title: Just For Laughs S25
programme.desc: Just For Laughswill tickle everyone's funny bone with its hilarious practical jokes, hidden camera pranks, and other creative hijinks.

programme.title: Ant-Man
programme.desc: Armed with a super-suit with the astonishing ability to shrink in scale but increase in strength, cat burglar Scott Lang must embrace his inner hero and help his mentor, Dr. Hank Pym, pull off a plan that will save the world.

programme.title: News Tonight
programme.desc: (Live) The daily evening-news programme featuring highlights and coverage of both local and international news with a local perspective.

programme.title: Evolution Earth
programme.desc: EVOLUTION EARTH embarks on a global expedition to reveal the extraordinary ways animals are keeping pace with a planet that is changing at superspeed. We meet the scientists, filmmakers and local communities at the front lines of this rapid change. They show that we too can help, and that if we work with nature in planned conservation efforts, nature can do more than survive - it can bounce back. .

programme.title: Fool's Gold
programme.desc: A new clue to the whereabouts of a lost treasure rekindles a married couple's sense of adventure -- and their estranged romance.

programme.title: Ollie And Friends S6
programme.desc: Cherry finds a magic-8-ball and uses it to 'predict' things. She grows over-reliant on it, but her friends let her know that she doesn't need the magic-8-ball to do amazing things. However, when the Shifty Squares start copying Sloppy's every move, it's time for Cherry, Ollie, and Sloppy to teach them to be themselves.

programme.title: Talking Point
programme.desc: The Strait of Hormuz is shut - and Singaporeans are feeling it at the pump, at the checkout, and at the airport. Steven Chia traces the fuel crisis from the waterway to your wallet.

programme.title: Kin
programme.desc: Jessica blackmails Jeffrey into doing her bidding to support Ah Yoke for the CEO position. Ella instigates Matthew to fight harder for Fiona. Emily is unaware that Eunice is scheming to throw James and Ananya together.

programme.title: Clean it, Fix it – Series 4
programme.desc: Master builder and household favourite Tommy Walsh, expert pro cleaner Maxine Dwyer and creative carpenter Asher Edwards help people across the UK to renovate and improve their homes. The team has two days to transform a living space in desperate need of some love. Series 4 sees enterprising co-presenter Mark Wright and a new expert de-clutterer join in the challenge of making tired homes relievable – without breaking the bank.

programme.title: Code of Silence
programme.desc: When the police ask Deaf catering worker Alison to lip-read criminals' conversations, she is plunged into a high-stakes new world. programme.title: 饭罪现场
programme.desc: 饭罪调查科收到来历不明的视频原来是饭罪煮谋公然挑衅味觉侦探视频中的面具男子叙述的犯案手法令人毛骨悚然而三位侦探沈志豪曾晓晴和陈宁则觉得饭罪现场有似曾相似的感觉指南针能否为他们指出真相平面图有什么提示侦探们必须与时间赛跑因为他们要赶在太阳升起前查出真相.

programme.title: 黄金年华之斗歌竞艺
programme.desc: 年过半百的乐龄人士在为家庭和事业奉献多年后终于迎来了人生的新篇章那些藏在心底的梦想如今将再次点亮舞台 新系列的节目将延续团战的形式为乐龄朋友们提供一个更多元更有趣的荣誉舞台让大家拥有同样的机会携手走到最后参赛者也可以一起展现真我切磋技艺以歌会友让生活更喜乐安康.

programme.title: 港女野人奇遇记
programme.desc: 港女野人前赴Owhango小镇先在旅馆会合守护河川的毛利领队预备两日一夜的划艇观鸟之旅 Amber更连夜搜寻雀鸟资料出发当天四位主持兴高采烈等待出发摄制队却突告知行程取消天气不似预期一夜暴雨河流湍急水位更超越安全线要延期还是缩减一半行程摄制队陷于两难全员投盲票决定.

programme.title: 他乡的煮人
programme.desc: 他乡的煮人将通过发掘各人的奋斗经历美食背后的故事以及烹调上精益求精的匠人精神加深观众对香港美食的认知不同年代皆有香港厨师凭借自身实力于世界各地一展所长落地生根节目将展现他们如何坚持香港饮食文化的传承创新融合三大原则将独一无二的香港美食立足他乡成就一个个动人的香港煮人故事.

programme.title: 千年陕菜 (第二季)
programme.desc: 千年陕菜围绕陕菜有哪些这一主题展开陕北关中陕南等地的美食悉数登场从古都深宫中传下的珍馐到市井街角里刷屏的小吃流转千年的味道从不被尊卑观念所束缚只因它们同样有着绵长的历史美食表面的热烈背后是一类食材一门技艺一段历史一脉血缘的集体作用行走三秦大地围坐民间老席在烟火生活中呈现陕菜饮食文化的历史长卷和陕西人的生活长卷.

programme.desc: Today's adventure takes Karthick to the breathtaking 7 Rila Lakes—a place where nature flexes its beauty with seven crystal-clear lakes perched high in the mountains. The views? programme.title: Thayamma Yenna Kaapaathuu!

programme.title: Thayamma Yenna Kaapaathuu!
programme.desc: Today's adventure takes Karthick to the breathtaking 7 Rila Lakes—a place where nature flexes its beauty with seven crystal-clear lakes perched high in the mountains. The views? A perfect mix of scenic hikes and soul-warming food—this is an episode you don't want to miss!

programme.title: Thayamma Yenna Kaapaathuu!
programme.desc: Karthick takes a deep dive into Bulgaria's past—unraveling stories of independence, Ottoman rule, and the rich history that shaped the nation. He explores an archaeological site right in the middle of the city, stepping through centuries-old ruins. But the real showstopper? Karthick makes history himself by cooking onion curry in Sofia—a feat no one (probably ever) has attempted! Will the locals approve?
